name: SUJA LIFE, INC.
business: Suja Life, Inc. sells organic cold-pressed juices, wellness shots, and functional sodas. Its products are distributed through retail customers and distributors. The company also offers private label products to retail customers.

exposures.sentence: Our cold-pressed juices and wellness shots products accounted for approximately 97% of our net sales and 96% of our shipments in fiscal 2025.
